commit.subject: LU-15069 clio: remove cra_oio
commit.message:
LU-15069 clio: remove cra_oio

cra_oio isn't really doing anything - it just serves
to mark an IO as not being readahead any more, but IOs
never transition from readahead to 'not readahead', so
this is a waste of time.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I9317457ac4c27b65a6cefa40f8a421aab76769cd
